notes: Templated checklist by procedure type. Payer-specific requirements vary and must be verified against the payer's policy.

procedures.name: MRI, musculoskeletal
items: ICD-10 diagnosis with documented duration of symptoms
Documentation of failed conservative therapy (typically 4-6 weeks of NSAIDs and physical therapy)
Recent X-ray report (if applicable)
Specialty referral note (if payer requires)
CPT/HCPCS code for the requested study and contrast indication if any
Site of service (in-network facility)

procedures.name: Advanced imaging, CT
items: ICD-10 diagnosis with red-flag features documented
Prior imaging or labs supporting medical necessity
Indication for contrast vs non-contrast
CPT code and bilateral/laterality where applicable

procedures.name: Surgery, elective
items: ICD-10 diagnosis and indication
History and physical within payer's required window
Documentation of failed non-surgical management
Pre-operative testing (EKG, labs, imaging) per facility policy
CPT code(s) for planned procedure
Anesthesia plan and ASA Physical Status
Place of service and facility NPI

procedures.name: Specialty drug
items: Diagnosis and supporting labs (e.g., HbA1c, biopsy report) per criteria
Documentation of step therapy failures or contraindications
Dose, route, frequency, and duration of therapy
Site of administration (home, infusion center, clinic)
Prescriber NPI and patient demographics

procedures.name: Durable medical equipment
items: Detailed written order signed by prescriber
Face-to-face evaluation note (within payer window)
ICD-10 diagnosis and clinical justification
HCPCS code for the device and any modifiers
Length of need and supplier NPI
